notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The address you visited doesn't exist. The link may have expired or the resource has been removed.
api.connection: Cannot reach API at {apiBaseUrl}. Make sure apps/api is running.
voice.autoplayBlocked: The browser blocked synthetic voice autoplay. Tap the realtime control again or check your mute settings.
voice.turnFailed: This turn failed. Please try again.
